blended.narrative: Plattekill Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 8 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 60°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Monday: light rain showers, highs of 49°F.
Tuesday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 40°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
